news.t: Vident Asset Management Congratulates Brown Advisory on the Launch of Its First ETF

holdings.infoBox: BAFE is an equity ETF with a total of 45 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 6.36%, Microsoft at 5.15%, Amazon.com at 4.48%, Alphabet at 4.24%, and Alphabet at 4.05%.

overview.description: The Brown Advisory Flexible Equity ETF (BAFE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund actively selects a concentrated portfolio of US based equity securities of mid- and large-cap companies, diversified across the economy. Flexibility in the name indicates the strategy is not constrained to a specific size or style BAFE was launched on Nov 18, 2024 and is issued by Brown Advisory.

data.title: Vident Asset Management Congratulates Brown Advisory on the Launch of Its First ETF
data.text: ATLANTA--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Vident is sub-adviser for new ETF from leading independent global investment management and strategic advisory firm Brown Advisory.
